---
title: "Track A (multi-ROI): Targeted mediation analysis (ACME/ADE; change-score template)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose
This step implements **targeted mediation analysis** using standard ACME/ADE outputs (via the `mediation` R package) in a two-wave **change-score** setting.

- Mediator model: ΔROI ~ Group + Age0  
- Outcome model: ΔY ~ ΔROI + Group + Age0  

This is included as a **secondary/targeted** analysis (e.g., to quantify indirect/direct components under the specified models). As in most observational two-wave designs, results are interpreted as a **statistical decomposition of association**.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(here)

source(here::here("R", "mediation_helpers_multiROI.R"))

in_dir  <- here::here("outputs", "trackA_multiROI")
out_dir <- in_dir

# Wide estimands table from Step 03
wide_est <- read_csv(file.path(in_dir, "trackA_wide_estimands_byROI.csv"),
                     show_col_types = FALSE)

# Example: run targeted mediation on RAW change estimands
# Outcome: dY_raw; Mediator: dROI_raw; Group: Sex; Covariate: Age0
res <- run_mediation_grid(
  wide_est = wide_est,
  roi_name = "ROI_name",
  outcome = "dY_raw",
  mediator = "dROI_raw",
  treat = "Sex",
  treat_ref = "F",
  treat_alt = "M",
  covar = "Age0",
  sims = 2000,
  method = "boot"   # "boot" or "quasi"
)

write_csv(res, file.path(out_dir, "trackA_mediation_targeted_raw.csv"))

head(res)
```
